What We Do

Specialised Stone Services

01

Natural Stone Paving & Pathways

Travertine, sandstone, slate and limestone — precision-laid pathways, courtyards and entertaining areas built to last decades.

02

Feature Walls & Facades

Stacked stone and dry-laid feature walls that elevate home exteriors and interior spaces with natural character.

03

Retaining Walls & Landscaping

Functional and beautiful stone retaining structures integrated seamlessly with your garden and outdoor design.

04

Fireplaces & Fire Pits

Custom stone fireplace surrounds and outdoor fire features — the centrepiece of any living space.

05

Custom Stone Features

Letterboxes, columns, garden beds, water features — bespoke stone elements that make your property stand out.

06

Lawn & Garden Services

Complete outdoor transformations combining stonework with professional lawn and garden landscaping.

Slate fireplace feature wall — Winston Hills project
About Urban Stoneworks

Passion for the Craft

Led by Luke, Urban Stoneworks brings expert craftsmanship, honest communication and genuine care to every project. Based in Winston Hills, we work across Sydney's residential and commercial properties — from intimate garden features to full landscape transformations.

Every stone is chosen and placed with intention. We don't just build — we create spaces that connect people to the natural world.

Punctual

We show up when we say and finish on time — every time.

Communicative

Luke keeps clients informed at every stage of the project.

Creative

Expert suggestions that genuinely enhance your outdoor space.

Reliable

Skilled, professional team that delivers exactly as promised.
